steps.title: Identify the chronological signal
steps.content: The notes give specific formation times: Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago and Pangaea formed about 300 million years ago.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
A directly states that Pangaea formed long after Ur, which reflects the order shown by the given dates.
The other three choices either omit the comparison, describe general traits, or focus on only one supercontinent without indicating which came first.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
